# Strale Beacon

> Free agent-readiness scanner for SaaS products and APIs

Strale Beacon scans any URL and assesses how ready it is for AI agent discovery and interaction. It checks 20 signals across 5 categories: Discoverability, Comprehension, Usability, Stability, and Agent Experience.

Each category receives a tier: Green (Ready), Yellow (Partial), or Red (Not Ready). There is no aggregate score.

## API

- Scan endpoint: POST https://scan.strale.io/api/scan
  - Input: { "url": "https://example.com" }
  - Output: Structured scan results with per-category tiers (green/yellow/red)
  - Caching: Results are cached for 1 hour per domain. Pass { "force": true } to bypass cache.

- Results endpoint: GET https://scan.strale.io/api/results/{slug}
  - Output: Full scan results for a previously scanned domain
  - Slug format: domain with dots replaced by hyphens (e.g., "stripe-com")

- Subscribe endpoint: POST https://scan.strale.io/api/subscribe
  - Input: { "email": "user@example.com" }
  - Output: Subscription confirmation for score change notifications

## Categories

1. Discoverability — Can agents find you? (llms.txt, robots.txt AI crawler policy, structured data, sitemap, MCP/A2A endpoints)
2. Comprehension — Can agents understand what you do? (OpenAPI spec, API docs accessibility, endpoint completeness, machine-readable pricing)
3. Usability — Can agents interact with you? (auth documentation, signup friction, sandbox availability, error response quality, SDK availability)
4. Stability — Can agents depend on you? (API versioning, changelog/status, rate limits, ToS agent compatibility, security headers)
5. Agent Experience — What happens when an agent shows up? (first-contact response, doc navigability, response consistency, support paths)

## Links

- Landing page: https://scan.strale.io
- Built by Strale: https://strale.dev
- Strale marketplace: https://strale.dev
